payload.objective: Prove the composed M1x8 producer, explicit score requantizer, score SRAM, two-pass replay, value rendezvous, and iterative divider against the integer performance model.

decoder_contract.decode_score_local_cluster_equivalence_s: Prove the composed M1x8 QK producer, explicit score requantizer, score SRAM, two-pass replay, value rendezvous, iterative divider, and result backpressure behavior against the integer performance-model reference.

evaluation_record.title: Decode-shaped M1x8 score tile for the Llama7B attention frontier
evaluation_record.primary_question: How do scalar-drain and packed-row M1x8 score tiles change measured area, delay, and the precision-aligned Llama7B token frontier relative to the semantically mismatched M16x8 recost?
evaluation_record.expected_reason: Cluster PPA is ineligible until scaling, score storage, replay ordering, value rendezvous, division, and backpressure preserve the end-to-end integer contract.
